name: Google Sheets
description: A lightweight spreadsheet tool for scenario models, prioritisation matrices, market sizing, resource planning, and simple strategic dashboards.
whyUseIt: Google Sheets is often the fastest way to model trade-offs, compare options, and keep a transparent record of the assumptions behind strategic decisions.
aiCapabilities: Google Sheets uses AI-powered formula help, cleanup suggestions, and natural-language assistance that make quick scenario modelling easier for non-experts.
